Cafeteria_Start.text: {showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 11, Time Unknown{nl}Inside Joypolis, Break Room

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: Ms. Miney, I'm Phoenix Wright, attorney at law.{nl}Please tell me what you know.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Like, huh?{nl}What does Pharmacist White want with me...?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: N-No, you've got it wrong! I'm an attorney, Phoenix Wright.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: You were a witness to the murder, right?{nl}I'd like to ask you about that...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I totally was. Like, I saw the whole thing.{nl}I'll tell you whatever you want to know.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (Alright, what should I ask her...)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Well, like, I was Mr. Daiba's{nl}manager.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: How did that come about?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Well, you know how I'm, like,{nl}studying parapsychology?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: N-No... I didn't know that.{nl}Really?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: And so, the, like, absolute god of parapsychology{nl}totally spoke to me.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: "You must work under Rando Daiba," he said.{nl}So, I, like, contacted Mr. Daiba right away.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: And, like, by total coincidence, the manager position{nl}was open.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: It was, like, exactly as the god said...{nl}I was just so moved...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I was, like, bawling my eyes out, and I bowed to Mr. Daiba{nl}and said, "Please hire meee!"

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: I-I didn't know you could get a job like that...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (Alright, what should I ask her...)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: Before the incident happened, did you notice{nl}anything unusual about Mr. Daiba?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Well, we had dinner together today, but...{nl}Nothing was, like, really unusual...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: Dinner? You two ate lunchboxes together?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Yeees. I brought my own lunchbox{nl}and went to the manager's office.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: To the manager's office?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: When I went in, Mr. Daiba was, like, alone...{nl}And he had already started eating.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: So I sat down too, opened my lunchbox,{nl}and we ate together.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: And, like, Mr. Daiba's lunchbox{nl}had both Worcestershire sauce and soy sauce packets in it.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: He looked, like, so happy pouring soy sauce{nl}on his fried food as he ate.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: We both finished eating, and around 7:10 PM,{nl}we left the manager's office together and parted ways.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: Where did the victim go after leaving?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I dunno... But I heard from the detective{nl}that Mr. Daiba took some sleeping pills, right?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: If so, he must have, like, fallen asleep{nl}somewhere in Joypolis.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (Alright, what should I ask her...)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Let's see... I think it was,{nl}like, around 7:40 PM.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I saw Mr. Powers carrying Mr. Daiba{nl}into the manager's office.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: After that, around 8:00 PM, Mr. Powers left{nl}the manager's office all by himself.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Mr. Powers seemed, like, totally shaken up...{nl}He hurriedly locked the door and left.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (I wonder if that's really true...)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (If I believe Will,{nl}then Ini's testimony is wrong.)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I had things to do too, so{nl}I, like, left the area.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Ah...{nl}Thinking back on it now,{nl}that was when Mr. Daiba was murdered, wasn't it...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I'm just... so ashamed of myself...{nl}Because if I had just rushed into the manager's office...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I might have been able to, like,{nl}save Mr. Daiba's life...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (Alright, what should I ask her...)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: That's a Jammin' Ninja shuriken, isn't it?{nl}Are you a fan?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Oh, you mean this hat?{nl}Mr. Daiba actually gave it to me.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: It's not really that I, like, like the Jammin' Ninja,{nl}I don't know anything about it at all, but...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: But since I got it from him, I totally treasure it.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Oh...{nl}Speaking of the Jammin' Ninja,{nl}have you seen the mystery poster yet?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: The mystery poster...?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: It's posted up in Joypolis, but{nl}it's, like, such a total mystery every time I see it.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: It's a puzzle where you figure out four numbers{nl}when you reach the goal, but...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Mr. Daiba was the one who put it up, but{nl}I wonder what those numbers are for...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (A poster the victim put up, huh.{nl}I wonder where it is in Joypolis?)

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: I've, like, never met anyone{nl}I respect as much as Mr. Daiba...

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Mr. Powers killed him... Mr. Powers ruined my divine guidance,{nl}and I, like, totally can't forgive him.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Please, like, totally crush him for me.{nl}Mr. Play-Wright, the total ladies' man.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: N-No, you've got it wrong.{nl}I'm an attorney, Phoenix Wright.

Cafeteria_Start.name: Ini
Cafeteria_Start.text: Like, huh? Judge Yamada?

Cafeteria_Start.name: Phoenix
Cafeteria_Start.text: (N-Never mind...)
{setState:Cafeteria_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:mayaMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
